name: lily-design-system-nunjucks-helpers
description: Lily Design System - Nunjucks helpers catalog (dev/test harness)

scripts.build: for d in lily-design-system-nunjucks-theme-select lily-design-system-nunjucks-locale-select lily-design-system-nunjucks-text-size-select; do name=${d#lily-design-system-nunjucks-}; tsup "$d/$name.client.js" --format esm --dts --clean --out-dir "$d/dist" && mv "$d/dist/$name.client.js" "$d/dist/index.js" && mv "$d/dist/$name.client.d.ts" "$d/dist/index.d.ts" && cp "$d/$name.njk" "$d/dist/"; done

author: joel@joelparkerhenderson.com
